---
title: "verify_valkyrie_real.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/verify_valkyrie_real.py"
loc: 1
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.60
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 6.87
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating hello.

## Interaction Protocol
Import hello and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `hello`
